candidates.recommendation: Strengthen technology neutrality enforcement in Gate 1 evaluation criteria

stateHistory.reason: False positive — product domain inherently involves Docker containers and cloud services. These are domain terms, not technology prescriptions.

candidates.finding: Azure Boards health check returned NOT_FOUND for project 'unplughq', which blocks the mandatory Task-First lifecycle for delegated specialist work even when artifact production is otherwise ready to proceed.
candidates.recommendation: Add a documented contingency path for early-phase artifact work when Azure project registration lags repo initialization, or add a pre-delegation validation step that fails before specialist invocation begins.

stateHistory.reason: Known issue — dedicated ADO project detection addressed during session.

candidates.finding: Content Strategist agent cannot automatically verify completion of Work Item states without direct CI access or terminal permissions.
candidates.recommendation: Allow agents a read-only terminal or direct Azure Boards API integration context to self-validate if terminal tools are withheld.

stateHistory.reason: CS tool access improvement recorded in retrospective.

candidates.finding: The invocation context places AB#207 in Sprint 1 and AB#201 in Sprint 2, but current draft P3 planning artifacts still show the reverse allocation.
candidates.recommendation: Add an explicit reconciliation step in P3 before RTE program-board work so PO and SM artifacts reflect the latest committed sprint allocation.

stateHistory.reason: Sprint assignment corrected during P3 execution. Not systemic.
